# /etc/hosts
127.0.0.1 localhost
192.168.1.10 dbserver.corp.example.com dbserver
10.0.0.1 gateway.internal.lan gateway
172.16.5.50 appnode1.corp.example.com appnode1

# /etc/resolv.conf
search corp.example.com internal.lan
nameserver 10.0.0.53
nameserver 8.8.8.8

# /sbin/ip addr show
1: lo: <LOOPBACK,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 65536
    inet 127.0.0.1/8 scope host lo
    inet6 ::1/128 scope host
2: eth0: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 1500
    link/ether 52:54:00:9a:c4:ad brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff
    inet 192.168.1.10/24 brd 192.168.1.255 scope global eth0
    inet6 2001:db8:85a3::8a2e:370:7334/64 scope global

# /sbin/ip route show
default via 192.168.1.1 dev eth0
10.0.0.0/8 via 10.0.0.1 dev eth1
172.16.0.0/12 via 172.16.5.1 dev eth2
